mapper.select: SELECT p.*, a.display_name AS display_name FROM player_cumulative_point p JOIN player_account a ON p.account_id = a.id ORDER BY p.total_point DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO player_cumulative_point (account_id, total_point, updated_at) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{addPoint}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_point = total_point + #{addPoint}, updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO point_history (tournament_id, account_id, entry_id, player_name, final_rank, prize_point, participation_point, total_point, awarded_at) VALUES (#{tournamentId}, #{accountId}, #{entryId}, #{playerName}, #{finalRank}, #{prizePoint}, #{participationPoint}, #{totalPoint}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT h.*, t.name AS tournament_name, t.held_date AS held_date FROM point_history h JOIN tournament t ON h.tournament_id = t.id WHERE h.account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY t.held_date DESC
SELECT * FROM point_history WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} ORDER BY total_point DESC
